nasb.text: They said, “You have not defrauded us or oppressed us or taken anything from any man’s hand.”

esv.text: They said, “You have not defrauded us or oppressed us or taken anything from any man’s hand.”

cnv.text: 他們回答：“你沒有欺負過我們，沒有虐待過我們，也沒有從誰手裡取過甚麼東西。”

ccb.text: 他们答道：“你没有欺骗、压迫过我们，也没有拿过任何人的东西。”
